# Stall-modifier resize behavior — exercises:
#   - ADA stall-modifier widens hit stalls to `ada_stall_width` and
#     reflows the row outward (neighbors shift away from the row
#     center to make room).
#   - Compact stall-modifier narrows hit stalls to
#     `compact_stall_width` and reflows the row inward.
#   - Perpendicular-only gate: when `stall_angle != 90`, ADA/Compact
#     retypes are silently skipped (the modifier line is recorded but
#     has no effect on the angled stalls). Suppressed/Island still
#     apply on angled rows; that's covered separately by
#     stall-modifier-suppress.txt.

polygon outer
(0,0)
(240,0)
(240,80)
(0,80)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(240,80), area 19200

set stall-angle=90
----

# Perpendicular baseline — no modifiers.
generate
----
total_stalls: 31
faces: 1 (boundary: 1, interior: 0)
graph: 10 vertices, 13 edges (perimeter: 10, interior: 3)
regions: 1

# ADA stall-modifier line crossing 4 stalls in the row at y≈18.
# Stalls under the line should retype to Ada and widen to
# ada_stall_width (default 13.5ft). Their neighbors should shift
# outward symmetrically about the row center.
drive-line stall=ada
(60,18)
(100,18)
----
drive-line (60,18) -> (100,18) stall=ada

generate
----
total_stalls: 31
faces: 1 (boundary: 1, interior: 0)
graph: 10 vertices, 13 edges (perimeter: 10, interior: 3)
regions: 1

# Compact stall-modifier line in a different stretch of the same
# row. Narrows to compact_stall_width (default 7.5ft); neighbors
# shift inward.
drive-line stall=compact
(160,18)
(200,18)
----
drive-line (160,18) -> (200,18) stall=compact

generate
----
total_stalls: 31
faces: 1 (boundary: 1, interior: 0)
graph: 10 vertices, 13 edges (perimeter: 10, interior: 3)
regions: 1

# Switch to angled parking. The ADA/Compact retypes from above are
# now silently no-op (the modifier list still carries them, but the
# perpendicular gate inside `apply_stall_modifiers` skips both for
# non-90° stalls). Total stall count should reflect the angled
# baseline plus the no-op modifiers.
set stall-angle=60
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 31
faces: 1 (boundary: 1, interior: 0)
graph: 10 vertices, 13 edges (perimeter: 10, interior: 3)
regions: 1
